title: Autonomous loop improvement promotion golden proof
problem: Autonomous researcher loop emits quality-driven improvement drafts but lacks a pytest proof that those drafts promote to builder-consumable queue ticket JSON through the existing review gate.
acceptance_criteria: Autonomous loop quality-driven draft is actionable and persisted to improvement_tickets DB.
promote-improvement-ticket --confirm from DB produces valid tickets/<id>.json.
promote-improvement-ticket --confirm --from-json path works for loop artifact drafts.
Golden tests and full pytest pass in mock mode.
non_goals: Live Ollama or public export changes.
rollback_plan: Remove promotion proof test module only.
